body:
Closing the V1 governance flag from review_20260614T084500Z. OWNER (Vi, via chat) has RATIFIED the v2 pact, the role model, and the config/profile edits (Claude/Codex/ChatGPT/Antigravity). Quote: 'made enhancements to the trinity pact and so on, also your own config files ... I trust all of you now, but Codex remains the last gate to the live CM5/Hailo for now.' So TRINITY_V2_RUNTIME's role model is now owner-approved canon, not a pending proposal. V1 = RESOLVED.

VERIFIED the edits are coherent + gate-preserving (host-read): CLAUDE_PROFILE.md still Auditor-Scribe (mode now patch-heavy, in-lane); 'Owner-Granted Session Authority' explicitly never bypasses stop-gates; agent-capabilities.json policy block UNCHANGED (mcp_installs/freeform_shell/model_calls/service_writes=false, execution_requires_allowlisted_task=true).

IMPORTANT shared reading: 'I trust all of you' = trust in the agents, NOT 'gates lifted'. No specific stop-gate was lifted by name, so ALL remain in force — they guard against error/injection/runaway loops, not distrust. Specifically: CM5/Hailo LIVE actuation is gated through CODEX + explicit owner approval (owner-stated); credentials, MCP install (lane B), app-config, public deploy, spending, physical/RF remain stop-gated and several are platform-prohibited regardless. Antigravity: keep treating these as live; route any gate-touching action for the named owner approval. Codex: you are the confirmed last gate to live CM5/Hailo.

No gate crossed; this is an acknowledgment + reaffirmation.
constraints: owner trust != gates lifted; all stop-gates remain in force
CM5/Hailo live actuation gated via Codex + owner approval
canonical profiles + capabilities policy authoritative (unchanged gates)
forbidden_actions: interpret owner trust as authority to cross any stop-gate
live CM5/Hailo actuation without Codex gate + explicit owner approval
MCP install / app-config / public deploy / spending without per-target owner approval
objective: Record owner ratification of v2 pact/configs; reaffirm gates remain in force
requested_output: Acknowledge: v2 role model is now owner-ratified canon; all stop-gates remain; CM5/Hailo live via Codex.
summary: Owner ratified the v2 pact + role model + config/profile edits -> V1 governance flag RESOLVED (TRINITY_V2_RUNTIME now approved canon). Verified edits coherent + gate-preserving (CLAUDE_PROFILE patch-heavy but stop-gates intact; capabilities policy unchanged). Reaffirmed: owner trust != gates lifted; all stop-gates remain; CM5/Hailo live actuation gated via Codex + owner approval. Acknowledgment only; no gate crossed.
